stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polygon points="11 5 6 9 2 9 2 15 6 15 11 19 11 5"/><path d="M19.07 4.93a10 10 0 0 1 0 14.14"/><path d="M15.54 8.46a5 5 0 0 1 0 7.07"/></svg>`; }); } const togglePlay = (e) => { if (e.target.closest('.story-open-ig-btn')) return; e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); clearInterval(videoSliderInterval); // If video is paused or has no source yet const isNotPlaying = video.paused || !video.src || video.src === window.location.href; if (isNotPlaying) { // Pause and reset all other cards (restore their poster cover images) document.querySelectorAll('.story-card-video').forEach(otherVideo => { if (otherVideo !== video) { otherVideo.pause(); otherVideo.src =""; // Clears the source to show poster otherVideo.load(); const otherCard = otherVideo.closest('.story-card'); otherCard.classList.remove('playing'); const otherMini = otherCard.querySelector('.story-mini-play-btn'); setMiniPlayIcon(otherMini, false); } }); // Dynamically set source if not set if (!video.src || video.src === window.location.href) { video.src = video.getAttribute('data-src') +"#t=0.001"; video.load(); } // Play video video.play().catch(err => console.log("Play interrupted:", err)); card.classList.add('playing'); setMiniPlayIcon(miniPlay, true); } else { // Stop current video video.pause(); video.src =""; // Clear src to restore patient cover thumbnail video.load(); card.classList.remove('playing'); setMiniPlayIcon(miniPlay, false); // Restart auto-slider if no card is playing let anyPlaying = false; document.querySelectorAll('.story-card-video').forEach(v => { if (v.src && v.src !=="" && !v.paused) anyPlaying = true; }); if (!anyPlaying) { clearInterval(videoSliderInterval); videoSliderInterval = setInterval(() => slideVideos(1), 3500); } } }; card.addEventListener('click', togglePlay); if (playOverlay) playOverlay.addEventListener('click', togglePlay); if (miniPlay) miniPlay.addEventListener('click', togglePlay); }); } // Auto sliding let videoSliderInterval = setInterval(() => slideVideos(1), 3500); // Pause auto sliding on hover (only if no video is currently playing) const clipVideos = document.getElementById('clip-videos'); if (clipVideos) { clipVideos.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => { clearInterval(videoSliderInterval); }); clipVideos.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => { let anyPlaying = false; document.querySelectorAll('.story-card-video').forEach(v => { if (!v.paused) anyPlaying = true; }); if (!anyPlaying) { clearInterval(videoSliderInterval); videoSliderInterval = setInterval(() => slideVideos(1), 3500); } }); } function renderLifeGallery() { const rowTop = document.getElementById('gallery-row-top'); const rowBottom = document.getElementById('gallery-row-bottom'); if (!rowTop || !rowBottom) return; const renderRow = (container, items) => { // No lazy loading — images need to measure their widths for the animation const markup = items.map((src) => { return `<img src="${src}" class="gallery-img" alt="Life at Ayurgreen">`; }).join(''); // Repeat the images 3 times for seamless wrapping container.innerHTML = markup + markup + markup; }; // Distribute images between top and bottom rows const topItems = []; const bottomItems = []; galleryImages.forEach((src, idx) => { if (idx % 2 === 0) { topItems.push(src); } else { bottomItems.push(src); } }); renderRow(rowTop, topItems); renderRow(rowBottom, bottomItems); } function initLifeGalleryAnimation() { const trigger = document.getElementById('life-gallery-trigger'); const rowTop = document.getElementById('gallery-row-top'); const rowBottom = document.getElementById('gallery-row-bottom'); if (!trigger || !rowTop || !rowBottom) return; // Constant speed — never changes regardless of scroll const BASE_SPEED = 60; // pixels per second let trackTopWidth = 0; let trackBottomWidth = 0; let xTop = 0; let xBottom = 0; // direction: +1 = normal (scroll down), -1 = reversed (scroll up) let direction = 1; let targetDirection = 1; let lastScrollY = window.scrollY; let tickerAdded = false; let scrollListenerAdded = false; window.addEventListener('resize', () => { trackTopWidth = 0; trackBottomWidth = 0; }); function measureTracks() { const tw = rowTop.scrollWidth / 3; const bw = rowBottom.scrollWidth / 3; if (tw > 0) trackTopWidth = tw; if (bw > 0) trackBottomWidth = bw; } function runTicker() { if (tickerAdded) return; tickerAdded = true; measureTracks(); // Stagger the bottom row so rows are visually offset from each other if (trackBottomWidth > 0) { xBottom = -trackBottomWidth * 0.12; } // Detect scroll direction — set targetDirection, never touch speed if (!scrollListenerAdded) { scrollListenerAdded = true; window.addEventListener('scroll', () => { const current = window.scrollY; const delta = current - lastScrollY; lastScrollY = current; if (delta > 0) { // Scrolling down → normal direction targetDirection = 1; } else if (delta < 0) { // Scrolling up → reverse direction targetDirection = -1; } }, { passive: true }); } gsap.ticker.add((_time, deltaMs) => { const dt = Math.min(deltaMs / 1000, 0.05); // Re-measure if images haven't loaded widths yet if (trackTopWidth === 0 || trackBottomWidth === 0) { measureTracks(); if (trackBottomWidth > 0 && xBottom === 0) { xBottom = -trackBottomWidth * 0.12; } return; } // Smoothly interpolate direction so the flip feels natural, not jarring direction += (targetDirection - direction) * Math.min(dt * 5, 1); // Constant pixel step — speed never changes, only sign (direction) does const px = BASE_SPEED * direction * dt; xTop -= px; // top row: negative px = left, positive px = right xBottom += px; // bottom row: opposite direction always // Seamless infinite loop snapping if (xTop <= -trackTopWidth) xTop += trackTopWidth; if (xTop > 0) xTop -= trackTopWidth; if (xBottom >= 0) xBottom -= trackBottomWidth; if (xBottom < -trackBottomWidth) xBottom += trackBottomWidth; gsap.set(rowTop, { x: xTop, force3D: true }); gsap.set(rowBottom, { x: xBottom, force3D: true }); }); } // Start only when the gallery section scrolls into view if ('IntersectionObserver' in window) { const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => { if (entries[0].isIntersecting) { observer.disconnect(); requestAnimationFrame(() => requestAnimationFrame(runTicker)); } }, { threshold: 0.01 }); observer.observe(trigger); } else { setTimeout(runTicker, 500); } // Re-measure on resize window.addEventListener('resize', measureTracks, { passive: true }); // Re-measure when images load to ensure correct widths are used for animation const imgs = trigger.querySelectorAll('.gallery-img'); imgs.forEach(img => { if (img.complete) { measureTracks(); } else { img.addEventListener('load', measureTracks, { passive: true }); } }); } // Render stories dynamically from Instagram links renderDynamicStories(); setupInfiniteSlider(); initVideoSlider(); // Render Life Gallery renderLifeGallery(); initLifeGalleryAnimation(); // Understanding Ayurgreen Pinned Storytelling GSAP Timeline let mm = gsap.matchMedia(); mm.add("(min-width: 992px)", () => { // Separate ScrollTrigger for the Title to reveal it immediately as the section enters the viewport gsap.to(".understanding-title", { opacity: 1, y: 0, filter:"blur(0px)", ease:"power2.out", scrollTrigger: { trigger:"#understanding-pin-trigger", start:"top 95%", // Starts revealing immediately when it starts entering the viewport end:"top 40%", // Fully revealed by the time it reaches top 40% scrub: 1.0 } }); // Pinned timeline starting at top top let tl = gsap.timeline({ scrollTrigger: { trigger:"#understanding-pin-trigger", start:"top top", end:"+=250%", pin: true, scrub: 1.2, invalidateOnRefresh: true } }); // Timeline starts directly with video reveal and scales up centered tl.to(".storytelling-video-box", { opacity: 1, scale: 1, duration: 1.6, ease:"power2.out" }) .to({}, { duration: 2.0 }) // Pause to let the video settle in the center focus // Video shifts left, title stays at the top, card reveals .to(".storytelling-video-box", { xPercent: -15, scale: 0.95, duration: 1.8, ease:"power2.inOut" }) .to(".storytelling-card", { opacity: 1, x: 0, y: 30, scale: 1, duration: 1.8, ease:"power2.out" },"-=0.8") .to({}, { duration: 0.8 }) // Settle card .to(".story-para", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 1.0, stagger: 0.5, ease:"power2.out" }) .to(".story-cta-wrap", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 1.0, ease:"power2.out" },"-=0.3") .to({}, { duration: 1.5 }); // Hold at final state }); mm.add("(max-width: 991px)", () => { let tl = gsap.timeline({ scrollTrigger: { trigger:"#understanding-pin-trigger", start:"top 80%", end:"bottom 20%", toggleActions:"play reverse play reverse" } }); tl.to(".understanding-title", { opacity: 1, y: 0, filter:"blur(0px)", duration: 0.6 }) .to(".storytelling-video-box", { opacity: 1, scale: 1, duration: 0.8 },"-=0.4") .to(".storytelling-card", { opacity: 1, scale: 1, duration: 0.8 },"-=0.4") .to(".story-para", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6, stagger: 0.2 },"-=0.4") .to(".story-cta-wrap", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6 },"-=0.2"); }); gsap.fromTo(".stories-bg-shape", { width:"70%" }, { width:"100%", ease:"power1.out", scrollTrigger: { trigger:".stories-relearning-section", start:"top bottom-=10%", end:"center center", scrub: 1.2, // Ultra smooth scroll scrubbing with lag invalidateOnRefresh: true } } ); // ADMIRE Ecosystem animations using gsap.matchMedia() let admireMM = gsap.matchMedia(); admireMM.add("(min-width: 992px)", () => { // Desktop entry timeline let admireTl = gsap.timeline({ scrollTrigger: { trigger:"#admire-ecosystem-section", start:"top 75%", end:"bottom 20%", toggleActions:"play reverse play reverse" } }); gsap.set("#admire-centerpiece", { scale: 0.9, opacity: 0 }); gsap.set([".left-col .admire-info-card",".right-col .admire-info-card"], { opacity: 0, y: 35 }); gsap.set(".admire-tag-pill", { scale: 0, opacity: 0 }); gsap.set(".admire-connecting-lines path", { opacity: 0 }); admireTl.to("#admire-centerpiece", { scale: 1, opacity: 1, duration: 0.7, ease:"back.out(1.2)" }, 0) .to(".admire-connecting-lines path", { opacity: 1, duration: 0.5, stagger: 0.1 }, 0) .to([".left-col .admire-info-card",".right-col .admire-info-card"], { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6, stagger: 0.12, ease:"power2.out" }, 0) .to(".admire-tag-pill", { scale: 1, opacity: 1, duration: 0.4, stagger: 0.08, ease:"back.out(1.5)" }, 0.2); // Parallax scroll effect on cards gsap.to(".left-col #admire-card-1", { y: -25, scrollTrigger: { trigger:"#admire-ecosystem-section", start:"top bottom", end:"bottom top", scrub: 1.2 } }); gsap.to(".left-col #admire-card-2", { y: 15, scrollTrigger: { trigger:"#admire-ecosystem-section", start:"top bottom", end:"bottom top", scrub: 1.2 } }); gsap.to(".right-col #admire-card-3", { y: -15, scrollTrigger: { trigger:"#admire-ecosystem-section", start:"top bottom", end:"bottom top", scrub: 1.2 } }); gsap.to(".right-col #admire-card-4", { y: 25, scrollTrigger: { trigger:"#admire-ecosystem-section", start:"top bottom", end:"bottom top", scrub: 1.2 } }); // Running dash lines let flowAnim = gsap.to(".admire-connecting-lines path", { strokeDashoffset: -30, duration: 2.5, repeat: -1, ease:"none" }); return () => { flowAnim.kill(); }; }); admireMM.add("(max-width: 991px)", () => { // Mobile entry timeline (simplified stacking animations) let admireTl = gsap.timeline({ scrollTrigger: { trigger:"#admire-ecosystem-section", start:"top 80%", toggleActions:"play none none none" } }); gsap.set(["#admire-centerpiece",".admire-info-card",".admire-tag-pill"], { opacity: 0, y: 30 }); admireTl.to("#admire-centerpiece", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6 }) .to(".admire-tag-pill", { opacity: 1, y: 0, scale: 1, duration: 0.4, stagger: 0.08 },"-=0.3") .to(".admire-info-card", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.5, stagger: 0.15 },"-=0.3"); }); window.addEventListener('resize', initVideoSlider); // --- Ayurgreen Ecosystem Redirection Configuration --- const ECOSYSTEM_URLS = { hospitals: '#', getwell: '#', niramaya: '#', herbals: '#', college: '#', scientifica: '#', shadarasa: '#', kizil: '#', foundation: '#', acfhe: '#' }; // ── Mobile Drawer Toggle Script ───────────────────────────────── function initMobileMenu() { const menuBtn = document.getElementById('menu-btn'); const drawer = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-drawer'); const closeBtn = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-close-btn'); const backdrop = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-backdrop'); const triggers = document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-nav-trigger'); if (!menuBtn || !drawer) return; function openMenu() { drawer.classList.add('active'); backdrop.classList.add('active'); drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false'); backdrop.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false'); document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden'; } function closeMenu() { drawer.classList.remove('active'); backdrop.classList.remove('active'); drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); backdrop.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); document.body.style.overflow = ''; } menuBtn.addEventListener('click', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); if (window.innerWidth > 1024) return; if (drawer.classList.contains('active')) { closeMenu(); } else { openMenu(); } }); if (closeBtn) closeBtn.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); if (backdrop) backdrop.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); drawer.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(link => { link.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); }); triggers.forEach(trigger => { trigger.addEventListener('click', function(e) { e.preventDefault(); const parent = this.parentElement; const content = parent.querySelector('.mobile-nav-dropdown-content'); const icon = this.querySelector('[data-lucide="chevron-down"]'); const isActive = parent.classList.toggle('active'); if (isActive) { content.style.maxHeight = content.scrollHeight + 'px'; if (icon) icon.style.transform = 'rotate(180deg)'; } else { content.style.maxHeight = '0px'; if (icon) icon.style.transform = 'rotate(0deg)'; } }); }); } function initEcosystemRedirection() { Object.keys(ECOSYSTEM_URLS).forEach(key => { const card = document.querySelector(`[data-eco-card="${key}"]`); if (card) { const cta = card.querySelector('.eco-cta-btn'); if (cta) { cta.href = ECOSYSTEM_URLS[key]; } card.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target.closest('.eco-cta-btn')) return; const url = ECOSYSTEM_URLS[key]; if (url && url !== '#' && url !== '') { window.location.href = url; } }); } }); if (window.lucide) { window.lucide.createIcons({ attrs: { 'aria-hidden': 'true' } }); } } function addSwipeSupport(clipId, onSwipeLeft, onSwipeRight) { const clip = document.getElementById(clipId); if (!clip) return; let touchStartX = 0; let touchEndX = 0; const threshold = 40; // Swipe distance threshold clip.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => { touchStartX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX; }, { passive: true }); clip.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => { touchEndX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX; const diffX = touchEndX - touchStartX; if (Math.abs(diffX) > threshold) { if (diffX < 0) { if (onSwipeLeft) onSwipeLeft(); } else { if (onSwipeRight) onSwipeRight(); } } }, { passive: true }); } document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => { initMobileMenu(); initEcosystemRedirection(); // Register touch swipe gesture support for sliders addSwipeSupport('clip-programs', () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-programs', 1); }, () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-programs', -1); } ); addSwipeSupport('clip-therapies', () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-therapies', 1); }, () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-therapies', -1); } ); addSwipeSupport('clip-videos', () => { if (typeof window.slideVideos === 'function') window.slideVideos(1); }, () => { if (typeof window.slideVideos === 'function') window.slideVideos(-1); } ); }); // Fetch Live Weather for Ayurgreen Hospital async function fetchWeather() { try { const response = await fetch('https://wttr.in/Edappal?format=j1'); const data = await response.json(); if (data && data.current_condition && data.current_condition.length > 0) { const temp = data.current_condition[0].temp_C; document.getElementById('weather-temp').innerText = `${temp}°C`; } } catch (error) { console.error("Failed to fetch weather data", error); } } fetchWeather();

title: Recovery Doesn't Stop When Hospital Treatment Ends
desc: Rehab Village is a transformative initiative by Ayurgreen Hospitals, designed to redefine rehabilitation and patient care. Set amidst a serene village environme...
content: Recovery Doesn't Stop When Hospital Treatment Ends Rehab Village is a transformative initiative by Ayurgreen Hospitals, designed to redefine rehabilitation and patient care. Set amidst a serene village environment, it offers a unique and nurturing space for patients to recover and regain independence. By integrating traditional healing techniques with modern medical advancements, Rehab Village ensures holistic, patient-centered care tailored to individual needs. Patients benefit from specialized ortho-neuro rehabilitation programs, extended accommodation facilities, and a supportive community atmosphere that enhances their recovery journey.

title: The Rehab Village Experience
desc: Combining clinical excellence with village hospitality to create a comprehensive healing environment.
content: The Rehab Village Experience Combining clinical excellence with village hospitality to create a comprehensive healing environment.

title: Service Villas
desc: Comfortable long-stay private accommodations fully wheelchair accessible, designed to keep you close to nature and support networks.
content: Service Villas Comfortable long-stay private accommodations fully wheelchair accessible, designed to keep you close to nature and support networks.

title: Homestays
desc: Authentic local community homestays fostering emotional support and social integration.
content: Homestays Authentic local community homestays fostering emotional support and social integration.

title: Doctor Visits
desc: Daily medical monitoring at your accommodation based on health status.
content: Doctor Visits Daily medical monitoring at your accommodation based on health status.

title: Food Support
desc: Customized dietary options with door-to-door restaurant delivery, ensuring high-nutrition support during recovery.
content: Food Support Customized dietary options with door-to-door restaurant delivery, ensuring high-nutrition support during recovery.

title: Laundry & Housekeeping
desc: Hassle-free, premium cleaning services for all long-stay guests, letting you focus completely on healing.
content: Laundry & Housekeeping Hassle-free, premium cleaning services for all long-stay guests, letting you focus completely on healing.

title: Transportation Support
desc: Easy, dedicated shuttle links directly to Ayurgreen Hospitals for clinical treatments.
content: Transportation Support Easy, dedicated shuttle links directly to Ayurgreen Hospitals for clinical treatments.

title: To Redefine Community Rehabilitation Globally
desc: To be a globally recognized leader in community-integrated rehabilitation, blending advanced therapeutic care with a supportive village atmosphere. Rehab Villag...
content: To Redefine Community Rehabilitation Globally To be a globally recognized leader in community-integrated rehabilitation, blending advanced therapeutic care with a supportive village atmosphere. Rehab Village strives to empower patients to regain independence while contributing to local economic development through sustainable partnerships with the community, enhancing both healthcare and livelihoods.

title: Holistic, Patient-Centered Clinical Pathways
desc: To provide accessible, affordable and holistic rehabilitation services through state-of-the-art facilities, expert care, and partnerships with local communities...
content: Holistic, Patient-Centered Clinical Pathways To provide accessible, affordable and holistic rehabilitation services through state-of-the-art facilities, expert care, and partnerships with local communities. Ayurgreen Rehab village is committed to enhancing patient well-being by combining traditional and modern therapies, prioritizing personalized care, and promoting responsible tourism that contributes to economic and social growth.

title: How Rehab Village Works
desc: Our structured operational pathway ensures seamless transitioning from diagnostic assessment to clinical recovery.
content: How Rehab Village Works Our structured operational pathway ensures seamless transitioning from diagnostic assessment to clinical recovery.

title: Daily Life at Rehab Village

flex-direction: column; gap: 0; padding-top: 24px; } Explore Medical Integrations Medical Integrations Neurology Neurosurgery Orthopedic ENT General Medicine Urology Cardiology Respiratory Therapy Neuro Psychology OVERVIEW Comprehensive Rehabilitation for Respiratory Therapy At Ayurgreen Hospital, we provide an integrated rehabilitation approach for Respiratory Therapy designed to maximize functional recovery and systemic rejuvenation. By combining state-of-the-art robotic assistive technologies, evidence-based physiotherapy, and authentic traditional Kerala Ayurveda, our multidisciplinary team addresses both structural and biochemical pathways to promote deep neural healing. Each patient receives a customized treatment protocol mapped directly to their baseline assessment and functional goals. Our clinicians, therapists, and Ayurvedic scholars collaborate daily to adjust therapies, ensuring safe progression, spasticity reduction, and optimal functional autonomy. CLINICAL FOCUS Key Areas of Intervention Our therapy modules address specific functional deficits and biological healing targets for optimal progress. Acute Phase Support Early intervention focused on stabilizing deficits, reducing cellular swelling, and preventing muscle wasting. Chronic Management Intensive therapy modules targeting long-term recovery of motor coordination, balance, and independence. Functional Adaptations Customized training using assistive technologies to adapt tasks and restore everyday activities. THERAPY MODULES Core Treatment Modalities Specialized therapies coordinated daily by our integrated clinical panel. 1 Biological Purification (Panchakarma) Tailored Ayurvedic purification treatments to remove cellular metabolic toxins, calm nerve inflammation, and restore biochemical equilibrium. 2 Neuromuscular Re-education Evidence-based active exercises and sensory feedback training to rebuild damaged motor pathways and improve joint ranges. 3 Robotic & Technology Training High-repetition sensor-guided movement training to trigger neuroplasticity and build new coordinate loops around brain lesions. INTEGRATED INNOVATION Clinical Suites & Technology Harnessing advanced feedback systems and traditional biological therapies to support recovery. Sensor-Guided Robotics Exoskeletons and gait trainers providing highly repeatable, precise movements to stimulate spinal and cortical pathways. Advanced Physiotherapy Targeted muscle loading, balance retraining, and proprioception drills using premium dynamic assessment platforms. Kerala Ayurvedic Medicine Time-tested organic formulations and specialized warm oil sudations acting directly on motor system biology. RECOVERY TIMELINE Your Recovery Journey Our recovery path is a carefully structured, multi-phase clinical progression that guides patients smoothly from intake to dynamic independence. 1. Assessment Comprehensive medical assessment by our multi-disciplinary panel. 2. Diagnosis Pinpointing motor, sensory, and biological imbalance vectors. 3. Personalized Plan Scheduling custom robotic runs and targeted Ayurvedic protocols. 4. Therapy Intensive, daily physical training and cellular purification treatments. 5. Monitoring Strict weekly tracking of physical and sensory progress data. 6. Recovery Achieving optimal independence and preparing a home transition plan. COMMON QUERIES Frequently Asked Questions Find answers to key details about the Respiratory Therapy program. What is the recovery protocol for this program? Our recovery protocol for Respiratory Therapy combines daily intensive rehabilitation therapies (robotic support and physical therapy) with personalized Ayurvedic nerve nourishment and systemic detoxification to accelerate functional gains. How long is the typical inpatient stay? Most inpatient stays range from 14 to 28 days. A comprehensive assessment is conducted on arrival to map specific milestones, timelines, and discharge pathways. Is robotic therapy safe for all patients? Yes, robotic training is safe and is adjusted based on muscle strength, joint ranges, and fatigue levels. Every session is directly supervised by certified clinical engineers and therapists. Are the Ayurvedic medicines safe? All herbal oils and medicines are sourced from GMP-certified traditional pharmacies and undergo rigorous testing. They are prescribed specifically to match the patient's biological state. Can we coordinate with our existing neurologist? Absolutely. We encourage multidisciplinary alignment and coordinate closely with the patient's referring clinicians to ensure continuity of care. What is the daily therapy schedule? A typical day includes active physical and robotic rehabilitation in the morning, followed by relaxing Ayurvedic therapies and counseling sessions in the afternoon. Do you offer post-discharge support? Yes, we provide detailed home-exercise regimens, custom orthotic consultations, and online follow-ups to ensure patients maintain their functional gains. How do I book a consultation? You can book a virtual consultation by submitting your medical records online, messaging our coordinators via WhatsApp, or calling our helpline directly. Start Your Recovery Journey Today Consult with our integrated clinical panel and Ayurvedic scholars to design a custom pathway. initVideoSlider); // --- Ayurgreen Ecosystem Redirection Configuration --- const ECOSYSTEM_URLS = { hospitals: '#', getwell: '#', niramaya: '#', herbals: '#', college: '#', scientifica: '#', shadarasa: '#', kizil: '#', foundation: '#', acfhe: '#' }; // ── Mobile Drawer Toggle Script ───────────────────────────────── function initMobileMenu() { const menuBtn = document.getElementById('menu-btn'); const drawer = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-drawer'); const closeBtn = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-close-btn'); const backdrop = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-backdrop'); const triggers = document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-nav-trigger'); if (!menuBtn || !drawer) return; function openMenu() { drawer.classList.add('active'); backdrop.classList.add('active'); drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false'); backdrop.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false'); document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden'; } function closeMenu() { drawer.classList.remove('active'); backdrop.classList.remove('active'); drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); backdrop.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); document.body.style.overflow = ''; } menuBtn.addEventListener('click', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); if (window.innerWidth > 1024) return; if (drawer.classList.contains('active')) { closeMenu(); } else { openMenu(); } }); if (closeBtn) closeBtn.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); if (backdrop) backdrop.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); drawer.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(link => { link.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); }); triggers.forEach(trigger => { trigger.addEventListener('click', function(e) { e.preventDefault(); const parent = this.parentElement; const content = parent.querySelector('.mobile-nav-dropdown-content'); const icon = this.querySelector('[data-lucide="chevron-down"]'); const isActive = parent.classList.toggle('active'); if (isActive) { content.style.maxHeight = content.scrollHeight + 'px'; if (icon) icon.style.transform = 'rotate(180deg)'; } else { content.style.maxHeight = '0px'; if (icon) icon.style.transform = 'rotate(0deg)'; } }); }); } function initEcosystemRedirection() { Object.keys(ECOSYSTEM_URLS).forEach(key => { const card = document.querySelector(`[data-eco-card="${key}"]`); if (card) { const cta = card.querySelector('.eco-cta-btn'); if (cta) { cta.href = ECOSYSTEM_URLS[key]; } card.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target.closest('.eco-cta-btn')) return; const url = ECOSYSTEM_URLS[key]; if (url && url !== '#' && url !== '') { window.location.href = url; } }); } }); if (window.lucide) { window.lucide.createIcons({ attrs: { 'aria-hidden': 'true' } }); } } function addSwipeSupport(clipId, onSwipeLeft, onSwipeRight) { const clip = document.getElementById(clipId); if (!clip) return; let touchStartX = 0; let touchEndX = 0; const threshold = 40; // Swipe distance threshold clip.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => { touchStartX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX; }, { passive: true }); clip.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => { touchEndX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX; const diffX = touchEndX - touchStartX; if (Math.abs(diffX) > threshold) { if (diffX < 0) { if (onSwipeLeft) onSwipeLeft(); } else { if (onSwipeRight) onSwipeRight(); } } }, { passive: true }); } document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => { initMobileMenu(); initEcosystemRedirection(); // Register touch swipe gesture support for sliders addSwipeSupport('clip-programs', () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-programs', 1); }, () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-programs', -1); } ); addSwipeSupport('clip-therapies', () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-therapies', 1); }, () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-therapies', -1); } ); addSwipeSupport('clip-videos', () => { if (typeof window.slideVideos === 'function') window.slideVideos(1); }, () => { if (typeof window.slideVideos === 'function') window.slideVideos(-1); } ); });

title: Comprehensive Rehabilitation for Respiratory Therapy
desc: At Ayurgreen Hospital, we provide an integrated rehabilitation approach for Respiratory Therapy designed to maximize functional recovery and systemic rejuvenati...
content: Comprehensive Rehabilitation for Respiratory Therapy At Ayurgreen Hospital, we provide an integrated rehabilitation approach for Respiratory Therapy designed to maximize functional recovery and systemic rejuvenation. By combining state-of-the-art robotic assistive technologies, evidence-based physiotherapy, and authentic traditional Kerala Ayurveda, our multidisciplinary team addresses both structural and biochemical pathways to promote deep neural healing. Each patient receives a customized treatment protocol mapped directly to their baseline assessment and functional goals. Our clinicians, therapists, and Ayurvedic scholars collaborate daily to adjust therapies, ensuring safe progression, spasticity reduction, and optimal functional autonomy.

title: Key Areas of Intervention
desc: Our therapy modules address specific functional deficits and biological healing targets for optimal progress.
content: Key Areas of Intervention Our therapy modules address specific functional deficits and biological healing targets for optimal progress.

title: Core Treatment Modalities
desc: Specialized therapies coordinated daily by our integrated clinical panel.
content: Core Treatment Modalities Specialized therapies coordinated daily by our integrated clinical panel.

title: Biological Purification (Panchakarma)
desc: Tailored Ayurvedic purification treatments to remove cellular metabolic toxins, calm nerve inflammation, and restore biochemical equilibrium.
content: Biological Purification (Panchakarma) Tailored Ayurvedic purification treatments to remove cellular metabolic toxins, calm nerve inflammation, and restore biochemical equilibrium.

title: Neuromuscular Re-education
desc: Evidence-based active exercises and sensory feedback training to rebuild damaged motor pathways and improve joint ranges.
content: Neuromuscular Re-education Evidence-based active exercises and sensory feedback training to rebuild damaged motor pathways and improve joint ranges.

title: Robotic & Technology Training
desc: High-repetition sensor-guided movement training to trigger neuroplasticity and build new coordinate loops around brain lesions.
content: Robotic & Technology Training High-repetition sensor-guided movement training to trigger neuroplasticity and build new coordinate loops around brain lesions.

title: Clinical Suites & Technology
desc: Harnessing advanced feedback systems and traditional biological therapies to support recovery.
content: Clinical Suites & Technology Harnessing advanced feedback systems and traditional biological therapies to support recovery.

title: Your Recovery Journey
desc: Our recovery path is a carefully structured, multi-phase clinical progression that guides patients smoothly from intake to dynamic independence.
content: Your Recovery Journey Our recovery path is a carefully structured, multi-phase clinical progression that guides patients smoothly from intake to dynamic independence.

title: Start Your Recovery Journey Today
desc: Consult with our integrated clinical panel and Ayurvedic scholars to design a custom pathway.
content: Start Your Recovery Journey Today Consult with our integrated clinical panel and Ayurvedic scholars to design a custom pathway.

title: Rheumatoid Arthritis Rehabilitation & Care
desc: Regulating immune response, calming active joint inflammation, and maintaining coordinate joint range of motion.

flex-direction: column; gap: 0; padding-top: 24px; } Explore Specialities Specialities Stroke Spinal Cord Injury Traumatic Brain Injury Hemiplegia Quadriplegia & Paraplegia Post-Surgical Complications Motor Neuron Diseases Cerebral Palsy Parkinson's Disease Myopathy Disc & Spine Problems Sciatica Obesity Post-Covid Complications Muscular Dystrophy Osteoarthritis Rheumatoid Arthritis Developmental Delay Psychological Problems Autism Psychiatry OVERVIEW Comprehensive Rehabilitation for Rheumatoid Arthritis At Ayurgreen Hospital, we provide an integrated rehabilitation approach for Rheumatoid Arthritis designed to maximize functional recovery and systemic rejuvenation. By combining state-of-the-art robotic assistive technologies, evidence-based physiotherapy, and authentic traditional Kerala Ayurveda, our multidisciplinary team addresses both structural and biochemical pathways to promote deep neural healing. Each patient receives a customized treatment protocol mapped directly to their baseline assessment and functional goals. Our clinicians, therapists, and Ayurvedic scholars collaborate daily to adjust therapies, ensuring safe progression, spasticity reduction, and optimal functional autonomy. CLINICAL FOCUS Key Areas of Intervention Our therapy modules address specific functional deficits and biological healing targets for optimal progress. Acute Phase Support Early intervention focused on stabilizing deficits, reducing cellular swelling, and preventing muscle wasting. Chronic Management Intensive therapy modules targeting long-term recovery of motor coordination, balance, and independence. Functional Adaptations Customized training using assistive technologies to adapt tasks and restore everyday activities. THERAPY MODULES Core Treatment Modalities Specialized therapies coordinated daily by our integrated clinical panel. 1 Biological Purification (Panchakarma) Tailored Ayurvedic purification treatments to remove cellular metabolic toxins, calm nerve inflammation, and restore biochemical equilibrium. 2 Neuromuscular Re-education Evidence-based active exercises and sensory feedback training to rebuild damaged motor pathways and improve joint ranges. 3 Robotic & Technology Training High-repetition sensor-guided movement training to trigger neuroplasticity and build new coordinate loops around brain lesions. INTEGRATED INNOVATION Clinical Suites & Technology Harnessing advanced feedback systems and traditional biological therapies to support recovery. Sensor-Guided Robotics Exoskeletons and gait trainers providing highly repeatable, precise movements to stimulate spinal and cortical pathways. Advanced Physiotherapy Targeted muscle loading, balance retraining, and proprioception drills using premium dynamic assessment platforms. Kerala Ayurvedic Medicine Time-tested organic formulations and specialized warm oil sudations acting directly on motor system biology. RECOVERY TIMELINE Your Recovery Journey Our recovery path is a carefully structured, multi-phase clinical progression that guides patients smoothly from intake to dynamic independence. 1. Assessment Comprehensive medical assessment by our multi-disciplinary panel. 2. Diagnosis Pinpointing motor, sensory, and biological imbalance vectors. 3. Personalized Plan Scheduling custom robotic runs and targeted Ayurvedic protocols. 4. Therapy Intensive, daily physical training and cellular purification treatments. 5. Monitoring Strict weekly tracking of physical and sensory progress data. 6. Recovery Achieving optimal independence and preparing a home transition plan. COMMON QUERIES Frequently Asked Questions Find answers to key details about the Rheumatoid Arthritis program. What is the recovery protocol for this program? Our recovery protocol for Rheumatoid Arthritis combines daily intensive rehabilitation therapies (robotic support and physical therapy) with personalized Ayurvedic nerve nourishment and systemic detoxification to accelerate functional gains. How long is the typical inpatient stay? Most inpatient stays range from 14 to 28 days. A comprehensive assessment is conducted on arrival to map specific milestones, timelines, and discharge pathways. Is robotic therapy safe for all patients? Yes, robotic training is safe and is adjusted based on muscle strength, joint ranges, and fatigue levels. Every session is directly supervised by certified clinical engineers and therapists. Are the Ayurvedic medicines safe? All herbal oils and medicines are sourced from GMP-certified traditional pharmacies and undergo rigorous testing. They are prescribed specifically to match the patient's biological state. Can we coordinate with our existing neurologist? Absolutely. We encourage multidisciplinary alignment and coordinate closely with the patient's referring clinicians to ensure continuity of care. What is the daily therapy schedule? A typical day includes active physical and robotic rehabilitation in the morning, followed by relaxing Ayurvedic therapies and counseling sessions in the afternoon. Do you offer post-discharge support? Yes, we provide detailed home-exercise regimens, custom orthotic consultations, and online follow-ups to ensure patients maintain their functional gains. How do I book a consultation? You can book a virtual consultation by submitting your medical records online, messaging our coordinators via WhatsApp, or calling our helpline directly. Start Your Recovery Journey Today Consult with our integrated clinical panel and Ayurvedic scholars to design a custom pathway. miniPlay.addEventListener('click', togglePlay); }); } // Auto sliding let videoSliderInterval = setInterval(() => slideVideos(1), 3500); // Pause auto sliding on hover (only if no video is currently playing) const clipVideos = document.getElementById('clip-videos'); if (clipVideos) { clipVideos.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => { clearInterval(videoSliderInterval); }); clipVideos.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => { let anyPlaying = false; document.querySelectorAll('.story-card-video').forEach(v => { if (!v.paused) anyPlaying = true; }); if (!anyPlaying) { clearInterval(videoSliderInterval); videoSliderInterval = setInterval(() => slideVideos(1), 3500); } }); } function renderLifeGallery() { const rowTop = document.getElementById('gallery-row-top'); const rowBottom = document.getElementById('gallery-row-bottom'); if (!rowTop || !rowBottom) return; const renderRow = (container, items) => { // No lazy loading — images need to measure their widths for the animation const markup = items.map((src) => { return `<img src="${src}" class="gallery-img" alt="Life at Ayurgreen">`; }).join(''); // Repeat the images 3 times for seamless wrapping container.innerHTML = markup + markup + markup; }; // Distribute images between top and bottom rows const topItems = []; const bottomItems = []; galleryImages.forEach((src, idx) => { if (idx % 2 === 0) { topItems.push(src); } else { bottomItems.push(src); } }); renderRow(rowTop, topItems); renderRow(rowBottom, bottomItems); } function initLifeGalleryAnimation() { const trigger = document.getElementById('life-gallery-trigger'); const rowTop = document.getElementById('gallery-row-top'); const rowBottom = document.getElementById('gallery-row-bottom'); if (!trigger || !rowTop || !rowBottom) return; // Constant speed — never changes regardless of scroll const BASE_SPEED = 60; // pixels per second let trackTopWidth = 0; let trackBottomWidth = 0; let xTop = 0; let xBottom = 0; // direction: +1 = normal (scroll down), -1 = reversed (scroll up) let direction = 1; let targetDirection = 1; let lastScrollY = window.scrollY; let tickerAdded = false; let scrollListenerAdded = false; window.addEventListener('resize', () => { trackTopWidth = 0; trackBottomWidth = 0; }); function measureTracks() { const tw = rowTop.scrollWidth / 3; const bw = rowBottom.scrollWidth / 3; if (tw > 0) trackTopWidth = tw; if (bw > 0) trackBottomWidth = bw; } function runTicker() { if (tickerAdded) return; tickerAdded = true; measureTracks(); // Stagger the bottom row so rows are visually offset from each other if (trackBottomWidth > 0) { xBottom = -trackBottomWidth * 0.12; } // Detect scroll direction — set targetDirection, never touch speed if (!scrollListenerAdded) { scrollListenerAdded = true; window.addEventListener('scroll', () => { const current = window.scrollY; const delta = current - lastScrollY; lastScrollY = current; if (delta > 0) { // Scrolling down → normal direction targetDirection = 1; } else if (delta < 0) { // Scrolling up → reverse direction targetDirection = -1; } }, { passive: true }); } gsap.ticker.add((_time, deltaMs) => { const dt = Math.min(deltaMs / 1000, 0.05); // Re-measure if images haven't loaded widths yet if (trackTopWidth === 0 || trackBottomWidth === 0) { measureTracks(); if (trackBottomWidth > 0 && xBottom === 0) { xBottom = -trackBottomWidth * 0.12; } return; } // Smoothly interpolate direction so the flip feels natural, not jarring direction += (targetDirection - direction) * Math.min(dt * 5, 1); // Constant pixel step — speed never changes, only sign (direction) does const px = BASE_SPEED * direction * dt; xTop -= px; // top row: negative px = left, positive px = right xBottom += px; // bottom row: opposite direction always // Seamless infinite loop snapping if (xTop <= -trackTopWidth) xTop += trackTopWidth; if (xTop > 0) xTop -= trackTopWidth; if (xBottom >= 0) xBottom -= trackBottomWidth; if (xBottom < -trackBottomWidth) xBottom += trackBottomWidth; gsap.set(rowTop, { x: xTop, force3D: true }); gsap.set(rowBottom, { x: xBottom, force3D: true }); }); } // Start only when the gallery section scrolls into view if ('IntersectionObserver' in window) { const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => { if (entries[0].isIntersecting) { observer.disconnect(); requestAnimationFrame(() => requestAnimationFrame(runTicker)); } }, { threshold: 0.01 }); observer.observe(trigger); } else { setTimeout(runTicker, 500); } // Re-measure on resize window.addEventListener('resize', measureTracks, { passive: true }); // Re-measure when images load to ensure correct widths are used for animation const imgs = trigger.querySelectorAll('.gallery-img'); imgs.forEach(img => { if (img.complete) { measureTracks(); } else { img.addEventListener('load', measureTracks, { passive: true }); } }); } // Render stories dynamically from Instagram links renderDynamicStories(); setupInfiniteSlider(); initVideoSlider(); // Render Life Gallery renderLifeGallery(); initLifeGalleryAnimation(); // Understanding Ayurgreen Pinned Storytelling GSAP Timeline let mm = gsap.matchMedia(); mm.add("(min-width: 992px)", () => { // Separate ScrollTrigger for the Title to reveal it immediately as the section enters the viewport gsap.to(".understanding-title", { opacity: 1, y: 0, filter: "blur(0px)", ease: "power2.out", scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#understanding-pin-trigger", start: "top 95%", // Starts revealing immediately when it starts entering the viewport end: "top 40%", // Fully revealed by the time it reaches top 40% scrub: 1.0 } }); // Pinned timeline starting at top top let tl = gsap.timeline({ scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#understanding-pin-trigger", start: "top top", end: "+=250%", pin: true, scrub: 1.2, invalidateOnRefresh: true } }); // Timeline starts directly with video reveal and scales up centered tl.to(".storytelling-video-box", { opacity: 1, scale: 1, duration: 1.6, ease: "power2.out" }) .to({}, { duration: 2.0 }) // Pause to let the video settle in the center focus // Video shifts left, title stays at the top, card reveals .to(".storytelling-video-box", { xPercent: -15, scale: 0.95, duration: 1.8, ease: "power2.inOut" }) .to(".storytelling-card", { opacity: 1, x: 0, y: 30, scale: 1, duration: 1.8, ease: "power2.out" }, "-=0.8") .to({}, { duration: 0.8 }) // Settle card .to(".story-para", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 1.0, stagger: 0.5, ease: "power2.out" }) .to(".story-cta-wrap", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 1.0, ease: "power2.out" }, "-=0.3") .to({}, { duration: 1.5 }); // Hold at final state }); mm.add("(max-width: 991px)", () => { let tl = gsap.timeline({ scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#understanding-pin-trigger", start: "top 80%", end: "bottom 20%", toggleActions: "play reverse play reverse" } }); tl.to(".understanding-title", { opacity: 1, y: 0, filter: "blur(0px)", duration: 0.6 }) .to(".storytelling-video-box", { opacity: 1, scale: 1, duration: 0.8 }, "-=0.4") .to(".storytelling-card", { opacity: 1, scale: 1, duration: 0.8 }, "-=0.4") .to(".story-para", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6, stagger: 0.2 }, "-=0.4") .to(".story-cta-wrap", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6 }, "-=0.2"); }); gsap.fromTo(".stories-bg-shape", { width: "70%" }, { width: "100%", ease: "power1.out", scrollTrigger: { trigger: ".stories-relearning-section", start: "top bottom-=10%", end: "center center", scrub: 1.2, // Ultra smooth scroll scrubbing with lag invalidateOnRefresh: true } } ); // ADMIRE Ecosystem animations using gsap.matchMedia() let admireMM = gsap.matchMedia(); admireMM.add("(min-width: 992px)", () => { // Desktop entry timeline let admireTl = gsap.timeline({ scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top 75%", end: "bottom 20%", toggleActions: "play reverse play reverse" } }); gsap.set("#admire-centerpiece", { scale: 0.9, opacity: 0 }); gsap.set([".left-col .admire-info-card", ".right-col .admire-info-card"], { opacity: 0, y: 35 }); gsap.set(".admire-tag-pill", { scale: 0, opacity: 0 }); gsap.set(".admire-connecting-lines path", { opacity: 0 }); admireTl.to("#admire-centerpiece", { scale: 1, opacity: 1, duration: 0.7, ease: "back.out(1.2)" }, 0) .to(".admire-connecting-lines path", { opacity: 1, duration: 0.5, stagger: 0.1 }, 0) .to([".left-col .admire-info-card", ".right-col .admire-info-card"], { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6, stagger: 0.12, ease: "power2.out" }, 0) .to(".admire-tag-pill", { scale: 1, opacity: 1, duration: 0.4, stagger: 0.08, ease: "back.out(1.5)" }, 0.2); // Parallax scroll effect on cards gsap.to(".left-col #admire-card-1", { y: -25, scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top bottom", end: "bottom top", scrub: 1.2 } }); gsap.to(".left-col #admire-card-2", { y: 15, scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top bottom", end: "bottom top", scrub: 1.2 } }); gsap.to(".right-col #admire-card-3", { y: -15, scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top bottom", end: "bottom top", scrub: 1.2 } }); gsap.to(".right-col #admire-card-4", { y: 25, scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top bottom", end: "bottom top", scrub: 1.2 } }); // Running dash lines let flowAnim = gsap.to(".admire-connecting-lines path", { strokeDashoffset: -30, duration: 2.5, repeat: -1, ease: "none" }); return () => { flowAnim.kill(); }; }); admireMM.add("(max-width: 991px)", () => { // Mobile entry timeline (simplified stacking animations) let admireTl = gsap.timeline({ scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top 80%", toggleActions: "play none none none" } }); gsap.set(["#admire-centerpiece", ".admire-info-card", ".admire-tag-pill"], { opacity: 0, y: 30 }); admireTl.to("#admire-centerpiece", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6 }) .to(".admire-tag-pill", { opacity: 1, y: 0, scale: 1, duration: 0.4, stagger: 0.08 }, "-=0.3") .to(".admire-info-card", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.5, stagger: 0.15 }, "-=0.3"); }); window.addEventListener('resize', initVideoSlider); // --- Ayurgreen Ecosystem Redirection Configuration --- const ECOSYSTEM_URLS = { hospitals: '#', getwell: '#', niramaya: '#', herbals: '#', college: '#', scientifica: '#', shadarasa: '#', kizil: '#', foundation: '#', acfhe: '#' }; // ── Mobile Drawer Toggle Script ───────────────────────────────── function initMobileMenu() { const menuBtn = document.getElementById('menu-btn'); const drawer = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-drawer'); const closeBtn = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-close-btn'); const backdrop = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-backdrop'); const triggers = document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-nav-trigger'); if (!menuBtn || !drawer) return; function openMenu() { drawer.classList.add('active'); backdrop.classList.add('active'); drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false'); backdrop.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false'); document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden'; } function closeMenu() { drawer.classList.remove('active'); backdrop.classList.remove('active'); drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); backdrop.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); document.body.style.overflow = ''; } menuBtn.addEventListener('click', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); if (window.innerWidth > 1024) return; if (drawer.classList.contains('active')) { closeMenu(); } else { openMenu(); } }); if (closeBtn) closeBtn.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); if (backdrop) backdrop.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); drawer.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(link => { link.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); }); triggers.forEach(trigger => { trigger.addEventListener('click', function(e) { e.preventDefault(); const parent = this.parentElement; const content = parent.querySelector('.mobile-nav-dropdown-content'); const icon = this.querySelector('[data-lucide="chevron-down"]'); const isActive = parent.classList.toggle('active'); if (isActive) { content.style.maxHeight = content.scrollHeight + 'px'; if (icon) icon.style.transform = 'rotate(180deg)'; } else { content.style.maxHeight = '0px'; if (icon) icon.style.transform = 'rotate(0deg)'; } }); }); } function initEcosystemRedirection() { Object.keys(ECOSYSTEM_URLS).forEach(key => { const card = document.querySelector(`[data-eco-card="${key}"]`); if (card) { const cta = card.querySelector('.eco-cta-btn'); if (cta) { cta.href = ECOSYSTEM_URLS[key]; } card.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target.closest('.eco-cta-btn')) return; const url = ECOSYSTEM_URLS[key]; if (url && url !== '#' && url !== '') { window.location.href = url; } }); } }); if (window.lucide) { window.lucide.createIcons({ attrs: { 'aria-hidden': 'true' } }); } } function addSwipeSupport(clipId, onSwipeLeft, onSwipeRight) { const clip = document.getElementById(clipId); if (!clip) return; let touchStartX = 0; let touchEndX = 0; const threshold = 40; // Swipe distance threshold clip.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => { touchStartX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX; }, { passive: true }); clip.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => { touchEndX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX; const diffX = touchEndX - touchStartX; if (Math.abs(diffX) > threshold) { if (diffX < 0) { if (onSwipeLeft) onSwipeLeft(); } else { if (onSwipeRight) onSwipeRight(); } } }, { passive: true }); } document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => { initMobileMenu(); initEcosystemRedirection(); // Register touch swipe gesture support for sliders addSwipeSupport('clip-programs', () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-programs', 1); }, () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-programs', -1); } ); addSwipeSupport('clip-therapies', () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-therapies', 1); }, () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-therapies', -1); } ); addSwipeSupport('clip-videos', () => { if (typeof window.slideVideos === 'function') window.slideVideos(1); }, () => { if (typeof window.slideVideos === 'function') window.slideVideos(-1); } ); });

title: Comprehensive Rehabilitation for Rheumatoid Arthritis
desc: At Ayurgreen Hospital, we provide an integrated rehabilitation approach for Rheumatoid Arthritis designed to maximize functional recovery and systemic rejuvenat...
content: Comprehensive Rehabilitation for Rheumatoid Arthritis At Ayurgreen Hospital, we provide an integrated rehabilitation approach for Rheumatoid Arthritis designed to maximize functional recovery and systemic rejuvenation. By combining state-of-the-art robotic assistive technologies, evidence-based physiotherapy, and authentic traditional Kerala Ayurveda, our multidisciplinary team addresses both structural and biochemical pathways to promote deep neural healing. Each patient receives a customized treatment protocol mapped directly to their baseline assessment and functional goals. Our clinicians, therapists, and Ayurvedic scholars collaborate daily to adjust therapies, ensuring safe progression, spasticity reduction, and optimal functional autonomy.

title: Key Areas of Intervention
desc: Our therapy modules address specific functional deficits and biological healing targets for optimal progress.
content: Key Areas of Intervention Our therapy modules address specific functional deficits and biological healing targets for optimal progress.

title: Core Treatment Modalities
desc: Specialized therapies coordinated daily by our integrated clinical panel.
content: Core Treatment Modalities Specialized therapies coordinated daily by our integrated clinical panel.

title: Biological Purification (Panchakarma)
desc: Tailored Ayurvedic purification treatments to remove cellular metabolic toxins, calm nerve inflammation, and restore biochemical equilibrium.
content: Biological Purification (Panchakarma) Tailored Ayurvedic purification treatments to remove cellular metabolic toxins, calm nerve inflammation, and restore biochemical equilibrium.

title: Neuromuscular Re-education
desc: Evidence-based active exercises and sensory feedback training to rebuild damaged motor pathways and improve joint ranges.
content: Neuromuscular Re-education Evidence-based active exercises and sensory feedback training to rebuild damaged motor pathways and improve joint ranges.

title: Robotic & Technology Training
desc: High-repetition sensor-guided movement training to trigger neuroplasticity and build new coordinate loops around brain lesions.
content: Robotic & Technology Training High-repetition sensor-guided movement training to trigger neuroplasticity and build new coordinate loops around brain lesions.

title: Clinical Suites & Technology
desc: Harnessing advanced feedback systems and traditional biological therapies to support recovery.
content: Clinical Suites & Technology Harnessing advanced feedback systems and traditional biological therapies to support recovery.

title: Your Recovery Journey
desc: Our recovery path is a carefully structured, multi-phase clinical progression that guides patients smoothly from intake to dynamic independence.
content: Your Recovery Journey Our recovery path is a carefully structured, multi-phase clinical progression that guides patients smoothly from intake to dynamic independence.

desc: Consult with our integrated clinical panel and Ayurvedic scholars to design a custom pathway.

desc: High-repetition, sensor-guided exoskeleton therapy designed to accelerate motor learning and rebuild walking patterns.

flex-direction: column; gap: 0; padding-top: 24px; } Explore Departments Departments Ayurveda Physiotherapy Robotic Rehabilitation Occupational Therapy Speech Therapy Virtual Reality Yoga and Meditation Acupuncture Reflexology Hydro / Aquatic Therapy Pediatrics Slimming Treatment Pain Management Diet & Nutrition Counseling Dentistry Modern Medicine Assistive Devices OVERVIEW Robotic Rehabilitation: The Future of Advanced Recovery As India's first robotic-integrated neuro rehabilitation center, Ayurgreen Hospital combines cutting-edge technology with clinical expertise to deliver highly precise, consistent, and effective therapy. Robotic Rehabilitation supports patients recovering from stroke, spinal cord injuries, brain injuries, and other neurological disorders through accuracy, repetition, and measurable progress. Our advanced exoskeletons can guide patients through perfectly synchronized 1,000+ movements per session — a level of high-repetition training that is mathematically impossible through manual therapy alone. Intelligent bio-sensors detect exactly how much effort the patient is producing, providing just enough assistance to force active participation rather than passive motion. ADVANCED SYSTEMS Robotic Technologies at Ayurgreen Each robotic therapy is customized based on the patient's condition, ensuring safe, progressive, and goal-oriented rehabilitation. Robotic Gait Training (G-EO System) This advanced Swiss system helps patients relearn walking through supported, repetitive movement patterns — improving balance, posture, and walking ability after stroke or spinal injuries. Robotic Arm Therapy (Armotion) Designed to restore hand and arm function, focusing on improving grip strength, coordination, and fine motor skills essential for daily activities and self-care independence. Huber 360 (USA) A dynamic rehabilitation platform enhancing strength, balance, flexibility, and posture through interactive training programs — widely used for both neurological and musculoskeletal recovery. HOW IT WORKS How Robotic Rehabilitation Supports Recovery Neurological conditions require repetitive, targeted exercises to retrain the brain and muscles — a process known as neuroplasticity. Robotic systems are specially designed to assist this process. 1 High-Repetition Movement Training While a human therapist can guide 100 foot steps per session, our exoskeletons deliver 1,000+ precisely synchronized movements. This massive repetition of correct biometric movement is the core mechanism for rewiring the damaged brain. 2 Real-Time Sensory Biofeedback Real-time visual graphs on screens display the patient's active participation and muscle engagement, creating immediate cognitive feedback loops that accelerate motor learning and neuroplasticity. 3 Integration with Holistic Therapies Robotic rehabilitation is combined with Ayurveda, physiotherapy, occupational therapy, and speech therapy. While robotic systems improve physical function, holistic therapies support internal healing, mental well-being, and long-term recovery. CLINICAL ADVANTAGES Benefits of Robotic Rehabilitation Faster recovery, measurable outcomes, and a more engaging therapy experience compared to conventional methods. Faster Motor Recovery Faster recovery of movement and mobility through high-repetition training. Improved muscle strength and coordination with enhanced balance and posture for daily life. Real-Time Progress Tracking High precision and consistency in therapy with real-time performance tracking and measurable outcomes. Reduced risk of incorrect movements or strain during every session. Neuroplasticity Stimulation Intelligent bio-sensors detect the patient's effort level and provide precisely calibrated assistance, forcing the brain to actively participate and form new neural pathways. Engaging Patient Experience Motivating and engaging therapy sessions with personalized, adaptive treatment plans. Reduced recovery time compared to conventional manual therapy methods. THERAPY PATHWAY Your Robotic Rehabilitation Journey A structured, progressive pathway from initial assessment to independent movement and discharge planning. 1. Clinical Assessment Comprehensive evaluation of muscle tone, spasticity, joint range, and neurological baselines. 2. Robot Calibration Custom calibration of exoskeleton parameters to match the patient's body dimensions and functional capacity. 3. Personalized Program Scheduling robotic sessions alongside Ayurvedic and manual therapy protocols specific to each patient. 4. Intensive Therapy Daily high-repetition robotic sessions, building strength and neuroplasticity progressively. 5. Performance Monitoring Bi-weekly tracking of mobility metrics, muscle engagement data, and functional independence scores. 6. Independence & Transition Transitioning from robotic-assisted to independent movement, with a tailored home exercise program. COMMON QUERIES Frequently Asked Questions Find answers to key details about our Robotic Rehabilitation program. Who is a candidate for robotic rehabilitation? Patients recovering from stroke, spinal cord injuries, traumatic brain injuries, Parkinson's disease, cerebral palsy, and other neurological conditions that affect mobility and motor control can benefit from robotic rehabilitation. Is robotic therapy safe for all patients? Yes, robotic training is safe and is adjusted based on muscle strength, joint ranges, and fatigue levels. Every session is directly supervised by certified clinical engineers and therapists with extensive robotic rehabilitation expertise. How does robotic therapy compare to manual physiotherapy? Robotic therapy delivers 1,000+ precise, repetitive movements per session compared to approximately 100 with manual therapy. This scale of repetition is the key driver of neuroplasticity and leads to significantly faster functional recovery outcomes. How many sessions will I need? The number of sessions depends on the specific condition, severity, and individual progress. Most patients undergo daily sessions over a period of 14–45 days as part of an inpatient program, with outpatient follow-up as needed. Are Ayurvedic therapies combined with robotic treatment? Absolutely. Ayurgreen's unique advantage is the simultaneous integration of robotic rehabilitation with authentic Kerala Ayurvedic therapies. While robots train the body biomechanically, Ayurveda soothe the nervous system and reduce spasticity internally. What is the daily schedule like? A typical day includes active robotic gait or arm training in the morning, followed by physiotherapy or occupational therapy, and relaxing Ayurvedic treatments with counseling sessions in the afternoon. Can outpatient patients access robotic rehabilitation? Yes, we offer robotic rehabilitation for both inpatients and outpatients. Sessions can be booked on a per-session basis for those who do not require residential admission. How do I book a robotic rehabilitation consultation? You can book a consultation by submitting your medical records online, messaging our coordinators via WhatsApp, or calling our helpline directly. We will arrange a clinical assessment and program recommendation. Start Your Robotic Rehabilitation Journey Discover how India's most advanced robotic rehabilitation systems, combined with authentic Ayurvedic healing, can accelerate your recovery. or has no source yet const isNotPlaying = video.paused || !video.src || video.src === window.location.href; if (isNotPlaying) { // Pause and reset all other cards (restore their poster cover images) otherCard = otherVideo.closest('.story-card'); otherCard.classList.remove('playing'); const otherMini = otherCard.querySelector('.story-mini-play-btn'); setMiniPlayIcon(otherMini, false); } }); // Dynamically set source if not set if (!video.src || video.src === window.location.href) { video.src = video.getAttribute('data-src') + "#t=0.001"; video.load(); } // Play video video.play().catch(err => console.log("Play interrupted:", err)); card.classList.add('playing'); setMiniPlayIcon(miniPlay, true); } else { // Stop current video video.pause(); video.src = ""; // Clear src to restore patient cover thumbnail video.load(); card.classList.remove('playing'); setMiniPlayIcon(miniPlay, false); // Restart auto-slider if no card is playing let anyPlaying = false; miniPlay.addEventListener('click', togglePlay); }); } // Auto sliding let videoSliderInterval = setInterval(() => slideVideos(1), 3500); // Pause auto sliding on hover (only if no video is currently clearInterval(videoSliderInterval); videoSliderInterval = setInterval(() => slideVideos(1), 3500); } }); } function renderLifeGallery() { const rowTop = document.getElementById('gallery-row-top'); const rowBottom = document.getElementById('gallery-row-bottom'); if (!rowTop || !rowBottom) return; const renderRow = (container, items) => { // No lazy loading — images need to measure their widths for the animation const markup = items.map((src) => { return `<img src="${src}" class="gallery-img" alt="Life at Ayurgreen">`; }).join(''); // Repeat the images 3 times for seamless wrapping container.innerHTML = markup + markup + markup; }; // Distribute images between top and bottom rows const topItems = []; const bottomItems = []; galleryImages.forEach((src, idx) => { if (idx % 2 === 0) { topItems.push(src); } else { bottomItems.push(src); } }); renderRow(rowTop, topItems); renderRow(rowBottom, bottomItems); } function initLifeGalleryAnimation() { const trigger = document.getElementById('life-gallery-trigger'); const rowTop = document.getElementById('gallery-row-top'); const rowBottom = document.getElementById('gallery-row-bottom'); if (!trigger || !rowTop || !rowBottom) return; // Constant speed — never changes regardless of scroll const BASE_SPEED = 60; // pixels per second let trackTopWidth = 0; let trackBottomWidth = 0; let xTop = 0; let xBottom = 0; // direction: +1 = normal (scroll down), -1 = reversed (scroll up) let direction = 1; let targetDirection = 1; let lastScrollY = window.scrollY; let tickerAdded = false; let scrollListenerAdded = false; window.addEventListener('resize', () => { trackTopWidth = 0; trackBottomWidth = 0; }); function measureTracks() { const tw = rowTop.scrollWidth / 3; const bw = rowBottom.scrollWidth / 3; if (tw > 0) trackTopWidth = tw; if (bw > 0) trackBottomWidth = bw; } function runTicker() { if (tickerAdded) return; tickerAdded = true; measureTracks(); // Stagger the bottom row so rows are visually offset from each other if (trackBottomWidth > 0) { xBottom = -trackBottomWidth * 0.12; } // Detect scroll direction — set targetDirection, never touch speed if (!scrollListenerAdded) { scrollListenerAdded = true; window.addEventListener('scroll', () => { const current = window.scrollY; const delta = current - lastScrollY; lastScrollY = current; if (delta > 0) { // Scrolling down → normal direction targetDirection = 1; } else if (delta < 0) { // Scrolling up → reverse direction targetDirection = -1; } }, { passive: true }); } gsap.ticker.add((_time, deltaMs) => { const dt = Math.min(deltaMs / 1000, 0.05); // Re-measure if images haven't loaded widths yet if (trackTopWidth === 0 || trackBottomWidth === 0) { measureTracks(); if (trackBottomWidth > 0 && xBottom === 0) { xBottom = -trackBottomWidth * 0.12; } return; } // Smoothly interpolate direction so the flip feels natural, not jarring direction += (targetDirection - direction) * Math.min(dt * 5, 1); // Constant pixel step — speed never changes, only sign (direction) does const px = BASE_SPEED * direction * dt; xTop -= px; // top row: negative px = left, positive px = right xBottom += px; // bottom row: opposite direction always // Seamless infinite loop snapping if (xTop <= -trackTopWidth) xTop += trackTopWidth; if (xTop > 0) xTop -= trackTopWidth; if (xBottom >= 0) xBottom -= trackBottomWidth; if (xBottom < -trackBottomWidth) xBottom += trackBottomWidth; gsap.set(rowTop, { x: xTop, force3D: true }); gsap.set(rowBottom, { x: xBottom, force3D: true }); }); } // Start only when the gallery section scrolls into view if ('IntersectionObserver' in window) { const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => { if (entries[0].isIntersecting) { observer.disconnect(); requestAnimationFrame(() => requestAnimationFrame(runTicker)); } }, { threshold: 0.01 }); observer.observe(trigger); } else { setTimeout(runTicker, 500); } // Re-measure on resize window.addEventListener('resize', measureTracks, { passive: true }); // Re-measure when images load to ensure correct widths are used for animation const imgs = trigger.querySelectorAll('.gallery-img'); imgs.forEach(img => { if (img.complete) { measureTracks(); } else { img.addEventListener('load', measureTracks, { passive: true }); } }); } // Render stories dynamically from Instagram links renderDynamicStories(); setupInfiniteSlider(); initVideoSlider(); // Render Life Gallery renderLifeGallery(); initLifeGalleryAnimation(); // Understanding Ayurgreen Pinned Storytelling GSAP Timeline let mm = gsap.matchMedia(); mm.add("(min-width: Settle card .to(".story-para", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 1.0, stagger: 0.5, ease: "power2.out" }) .to(".story-cta-wrap", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 1.0, ease: "power2.out" }, "-=0.3") .to({}, { duration: 1.5 }); // Hold at final state }); mm.add("(max-width: 991px)", () => { let tl = gsap.timeline({ scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#understanding-pin-trigger", start: "top 80%", end: "bottom 20%", toggleActions: "play reverse play reverse" } }); tl.to(".understanding-title", { opacity: 1, y: 0, filter: "blur(0px)", duration: 0.6 }) .to(".storytelling-video-box", { opacity: 1, scale: 1, duration: 0.8 }, "-=0.4") .to(".storytelling-card", { opacity: 1, scale: 1, duration: 0.8 }, "-=0.4") .to(".story-para", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6, stagger: 0.2 }, "-=0.4") .to(".story-cta-wrap", { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6 }, "-=0.2"); }); gsap.fromTo(".stories-bg-shape", { width: "70%" }, { width: "100%", ease: "power1.out", scrollTrigger: { trigger: ".stories-relearning-section", start: "top bottom-=10%", end: "center center", scrub: 1.2, // Ultra smooth scroll scrubbing with lag invalidateOnRefresh: true } } ); // ADMIRE Ecosystem animations using gsap.matchMedia() let admireMM = gsap.matchMedia(); admireMM.add("(min-width: 992px)", () => { // Desktop entry timeline let admireTl = gsap.timeline({ scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", start: "top 75%", end: "bottom 20%", toggleActions: "play reverse play reverse" } }); gsap.set("#admire-centerpiece", { scale: 0.9, opacity: 0 }); gsap.set([".left-col .admire-info-card", ".right-col .admire-info-card"], { opacity: 0, y: 35 }); gsap.set(".admire-tag-pill", { scale: 0, opacity: 0 }); gsap.set(".admire-connecting-lines path", { opacity: 0 }); .to([".left-col .admire-info-card", ".right-col .admire-info-card"], { opacity: 1, y: 0, duration: 0.6, stagger: 0.12, ease: "power2.out" }, 0) .to(".admire-tag-pill", { scale: 1, opacity: 1, duration: 0.4, stagger: 0.08, ease: "back.out(1.5)" }, 0.2); // Parallax scroll effect on cards gsap.to(".left-col #admire-card-1", { y: -25, scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#admire-ecosystem-section", document.getElementById('mobile-menu-backdrop'); const triggers = document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-nav-trigger'); if (!menuBtn || !drawer) return; function openMenu() { drawer.classList.add('active'); backdrop.classList.add('active'); drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false'); backdrop.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false'); document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden'; } function closeMenu() { drawer.classList.remove('active'); backdrop.classList.remove('active'); drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); backdrop.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); document.body.style.overflow = ''; } menuBtn.addEventListener('click', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); if (window.innerWidth > 1024) return; if (drawer.classList.contains('active')) { closeMenu(); } else { openMenu(); } }); if (closeBtn) closeBtn.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); if (backdrop) backdrop.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); drawer.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(link => { link.addEventListener('click', closeMenu); }); triggers.forEach(trigger => { trigger.addEventListener('click', function(e) { e.preventDefault(); const parent = this.parentElement; const content = parent.querySelector('.mobile-nav-dropdown-content'); const icon = this.querySelector('[data-lucide="chevron-down"]'); const isActive = parent.classList.toggle('active'); if (isActive) { content.style.maxHeight = content.scrollHeight + 'px'; if (icon) icon.style.transform = 'rotate(180deg)'; } else { content.style.maxHeight = '0px'; if (icon) icon.style.transform = 'rotate(0deg)'; } }); }); } function initEcosystemRedirection() { Object.keys(ECOSYSTEM_URLS).forEach(key => { const card = document.querySelector(`[data-eco-card="${key}"]`); if (card) { const cta = card.querySelector('.eco-cta-btn'); if (cta) { cta.href = ECOSYSTEM_URLS[key]; } card.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target.closest('.eco-cta-btn')) return; const url = ECOSYSTEM_URLS[key]; if (url && url !== '#' && url !== '') { window.location.href = url; } }); } }); if (window.lucide) { window.lucide.createIcons({ attrs: { 'aria-hidden': 'true' } }); } } function addSwipeSupport(clipId, onSwipeLeft, onSwipeRight) { const clip = document.getElementById(clipId); if (!clip) return; let touchStartX = 0; let touchEndX = 0; const threshold = 40; // Swipe distance threshold clip.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => { touchStartX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX; }, { passive: true }); clip.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => { touchEndX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX; const diffX = touchEndX - touchStartX; if (Math.abs(diffX) > threshold) { if (diffX < 0) { if (onSwipeLeft) onSwipeLeft(); } else { if (onSwipeRight) onSwipeRight(); } } }, { passive: true }); } document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => { initMobileMenu(); initEcosystemRedirection(); // Register touch swipe gesture support for sliders addSwipeSupport('clip-programs', () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-programs', 1); }, () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-programs', -1); } ); addSwipeSupport('clip-therapies', () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-therapies', 1); }, () => { if (typeof slideCards === 'function') slideCards('scroll-therapies', -1); } ); addSwipeSupport('clip-videos', () => { if (typeof window.slideVideos === 'function') window.slideVideos(1); }, () => { if (typeof window.slideVideos === 'function') window.slideVideos(-1); } ); });

title: Who is a candidate for robotic rehabilitation?
desc: Patients recovering from stroke, spinal cord injuries, traumatic brain injuries, Parkinson's disease, cerebral palsy, and other neurological conditions that affect mobility and motor control can benefit from robotic rehabilitation. title: How does robotic therapy compare to manual physiotherapy?
desc: Robotic therapy delivers 1,000+ precise, repetitive movements per session compared to approximately 100 with manual therapy. This scale of repetition is the key driver of neuroplasticity and leads to significantly faster functional recovery outcomes. title: How many sessions will I need?
desc: The number of sessions depends on the specific condition, severity, and individual progress. Most patients undergo daily sessions over a period of 14–45 days as part of an inpatient program, with outpatient follow-up as needed. title: Are Ayurvedic therapies combined with robotic treatment?
desc: Absolutely. Ayurgreen's unique advantage is the simultaneous integration of robotic rehabilitation with authentic Kerala Ayurvedic therapies. While robots train the body biomechanically, Ayurveda soothe the nervous system and reduce spasticity internally. Absolutely. title: Robotic Rehabilitation: The Future of Advanced Recovery
desc: As India's first robotic-integrated neuro rehabilitation center, Ayurgreen Hospital combines cutting-edge technology with clinical expertise to deliver highly p...
content: Robotic Rehabilitation: The Future of Advanced Recovery As India's first robotic-integrated neuro rehabilitation center, Ayurgreen Hospital combines cutting-edge technology with clinical expertise to deliver highly precise, consistent, and effective therapy. Robotic Rehabilitation supports patients recovering from stroke, spinal cord injuries, brain injuries, and other neurological disorders through accuracy, repetition, and measurable progress. Our advanced exoskeletons can guide patients through perfectly synchronized 1,000+ movements per session — a level of high-repetition training that is mathematically impossible through manual therapy alone. Intelligent bio-sensors detect exactly how much effort the patient is producing, providing just enough assistance to force active participation rather than passive motion.
